widgets.title: Usuarios Activos
widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM usage WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE

widgets.title: Requests por Agente
widgets.query: SELECT agent, COUNT(*) as requests FROM usage GROUP BY agent

widgets.title: Tasa de Errores
widgets.query: SELECT timestamp, error_count/total_requests as error_rate FROM metrics

widgets.title: Tiempo Medio de Respuesta
widgets.query: SELECT AVG(response_time_ms) FROM usage WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE
